items.name: Yuca Fries
items.description: Crispy cassava fries, chipotle aioli, lime.

items.name: Elote
items.description: Grilled corn, cotija cheese, chipotle mayo, tajin, cilantro.

items.name: Tostones
items.description: Twice-fried green plantains, guacamole, pico de gallo.

items.name: Tuna Ceviche
items.description: Ahi tuna, leche de tigre, avocado, crispy shallots, plantain chips.

items.name: Shrimp Aguachile
items.description: Wild shrimp, serrano chile, cucumber, red onion, lime.

items.name: Hamachi Tiradito
items.description: Sliced yellowtail, aji amarillo, ponzu, micro cilantro.

items.name: Chicken al Pastor Tacos
items.description: Achiote-marinated chicken, grilled pineapple, onion, cilantro. Three tacos.

items.name: Short Rib Tacos
items.description: Braised short rib, pickled onion, salsa verde, queso fresco. Three tacos.

items.name: Baja Fish Tacos
items.description: Beer-battered cod, chipotle slaw, avocado crema. Three tacos.

items.name: Grilled Octopus
items.description: Charred octopus, romesco sauce, chorizo, fingerling potatoes.

items.name: Braised Pork Belly
items.description: Slow-cooked pork belly, mole negro, pickled vegetables, micro greens.

items.name: Grilled Branzino
items.description: Whole grilled branzino, salsa verde, roasted vegetables, lime.

items.name: Skirt Steak
items.description: 10oz grilled skirt steak, chimichurri, roasted potatoes, grilled broccolini.

items.name: Chicken Mole
items.description: Half roasted chicken, traditional oaxacan mole, Mexican rice, black beans.

items.name: Arroz con Mariscos
items.description: Seafood rice with shrimp, mussels, calamari, saffron, sofrito.

items.name: Churros
items.description: Cinnamon sugar churros, cajeta caramel, chocolate ganache.

items.name: Tres Leches
items.description: Classic three-milk cake, whipped cream, fresh berries.

items.name: Coconut Flan
items.description: Coconut crème caramel, toasted coconut, mango coulis.
